welcome.headline: Your legacy, sealed until it's needed.
welcome.subhead: One private vault for your whole estate, released exactly as you intend.
welcome.footer: We can never read what you store.

home.vaultSecuredHint: Everything you store stays end-to-end encrypted on this device.

vaultHome.nextDue: Next check-in due in {{days}} days · {{streak}} in a row
vaultHome.graceCountdown: Release in {{days}} days unless you check in
vaultHome.graceNoteUrgent: Check in now to re-arm your vault and stop the countdown.
vaultHome.graceNote: If you miss a check-in, a {{days}}-day grace period begins before release is authorized.

dist.title: Distribution
dist.subtitle: The exact order release follows
dist.releaseNote: Released only after a missed check-in + grace period. Authorized server-side.
dist.unlockToPreview: Unlock your vault to preview how your estate will be distributed.
dist.noValues: Add estimated values to your assets to preview the distribution.
dist.noHeirs: Add your heirs to see their legal shares.
dist.reviewHeirs: Complete your heir details on the Heirs tab to compute exact shares.
dist.primaryCurrencyNote: Showing {{currency}}. Other currencies are released under the same shares.

vault.emptyBody: Add documents, accounts, and instructions — all encrypted on this device before they ever leave it.
vault.unlockSubhead: Enter your vault passphrase to open your encrypted assets.

summary.noValues: Add estimated values to see your net estate.

form.createSub: Encrypted on your device before it ever leaves.
form.lockNote: Sensitive details never reach our servers in plaintext.

namePlaceholder.business: e.g. Shares in Al Noor Trading

delete.title: Delete this asset?
delete.body: This permanently removes the asset and its attached file. This can't be undone.

people.emptyBody: Add the people who inherit, so your vault reaches them exactly as you intend.

wasiyyah.title: Wasiyyah
wasiyyah.subtitle: وصية · your freely-willed bequest
wasiyyah.atCap: You’ve reached the Sharia limit. A bequest can’t exceed one-third of the net estate.
wasiyyah.withinLimit: Within the permitted one-third. {{headroom}} of headroom remaining.
wasiyyah.pickBeneficiary: Choose a beneficiary and their share
wasiyyah.noAllocations: No bequests yet — tap + to allocate a share to a beneficiary.
wasiyyah.needBeneficiariesBody: Wasiyyah is allocated to your beneficiaries. Add them, then return to set each one’s share.
wasiyyah.ruleBody: Debts are settled first. You may freely will up to one-third to anyone — often charity or non-heirs. The remaining two-thirds passes to legal heirs by Fara’id.

heirs.title: Heirs
heirs.subtitle: Fara’id — legal shares, computed automatically
heirs.whatIf: “What-if” scenario — shares recalculated for living relatives only.
heirs.sharia: Fractions are derived from Sharia law — they can’t be manually overridden.
heirs.emptyBody: Add your relatives and Wassiya computes each one’s legal Fara’id share automatically.
heirs.genderPrompt: To compute the spouse’s share, set your own gender first.
heirs.disclaimer: Provisional — not legal advice. Pending scholarly certification.

assetFields.pinHint_ph: A hint — never the PIN itself

settings.title: Settings
settings.biometricEnableHint: Enable it next time you unlock.

profile.title: Profile
profile.cadenceSubtitle: How often Wassiya expects a check-in from you.
profile.graceSubtitle: Time after a missed check-in before release begins.
profile.biometricHint: Enable it next time you unlock.
profile.themeSubtitle: Choose how Wassiya looks on this device.
profile.genderSubtitle: Required to compute the spouse’s Fara’id share.

paywall.title: Wassiya Premium
paywall.manageOnWeb: Manage your subscription on the web to unlock your vault.

encrypt.title: Encrypting on device…
encrypt.body: AES-256-GCM · random IV · master key in memory
encrypt.doneBody: Only your devices can ever decrypt this.

contacts.title: Bequest recipients
contacts.subtitle: Non-heir people who receive a bequest and can decrypt your vault
contacts.noBeneficiaries: No recipients yet — add a non-heir who’ll receive a bequest. (Heirs are added on the Heirs tab.)
contacts.noExecutors: No executors yet — add trusted contacts who confirm your passing.
contacts.cantRemoveBeneficiary: Remove this person’s bequest in Wasiyyah before removing them.
contacts.beneficiarySub: They can decrypt your vault after release.
contacts.executorSub: They confirm your passing and coordinate release.
contacts.name: Name (private)
contacts.inviteMessage: I’ve added you ({{who}}) to my Wassiya estate vault. Accept your invite here: {{link}}
contacts.removeBody: {{who}} will no longer be part of your release. This can’t be undone.
contacts.disclaimer: Recipients accept by signing up; they can only ever decrypt your vault after release is authorized — never before.

addHeir.title: Add heir
addHeir.subtitle: Shares are derived from the relationship
addHeir.emailHint: Add an email to invite them to decrypt your vault after release. Every heir is a beneficiary.
addHeir.note: Their Fara’id fraction recalculates automatically across all heirs.
addHeir.spouseNeedsGender: Set your own gender (Profile) before adding a spouse.

onboarding.headline: Create your vault PIN
onboarding.security: Your sign-in proves who you are. Your 6-digit PIN unlocks your encrypted vault on this device. You'll also get a one-time Recovery Key — the only way back in if you forget your PIN or change devices.
onboarding.recoveryWarning: If you forget it, only your printed recovery kit can restore the vault.
onboarding.pinHint: You'll use this to unlock your vault.

cadence.title: Set your heartbeat
cadence.subtitle: How often should Wassiya expect a check-in from you?
cadence.graceNote: Plus a 14-day grace period with reminders before any release.

armed.title: Your vault is armed
armed.body: Encrypted, listening, and ready. Add your first asset and check in to keep it active.

unlock.heading: Unlock your vault
unlock.subhead: Enter your PIN to unlock your vault.

biometric.enrollBody: Use your device biometrics to open your vault with a touch — your key stays on this device, protected by your biometrics.

recovery.title: Recover your vault
recovery.body: Enter your Recovery Key to restore access on this device, then set a new PIN.
recovery.invalidKey: That Recovery Key isn't right. Check it and try again.
recovery.setNewPin: Set a new 6-digit PIN for this device.
recovery.saveBody: This is the ONLY way back into your vault if you forget your PIN or switch devices. We can never recover it for you — store it somewhere safe.
recovery.warning: If you lose both your PIN and this key, your vault can never be opened.
recovery.saved: I've saved my Recovery Key somewhere safe.
